channel.title: Image Editing auf Nicky Reinert
channel.description: Blog & projects by Nicky Reinert (Institute for Digital Challenges): web development & software development, SEO & analytics, hosting & DevOps, WordPress & Hugo, tools & projects, data protection & digital culture — plus content on AI and autism & society.

item.title: pictero.com
item.description: Well, another year, another idea for my domain pictero.com. I was about to get rid of that domain for good. But here we are. This time I spend a little more time in a “product” - or whatever you want to call it and I came up with this idea: A (mostly) browser based toolbox for a couple of common, …
item.dc:subject: Lesezeit: 10 Minuten
